name: TX_CLARI_1
comments:
On day 4-7 BID oral doses. Form: immediate release (IR)
On day 8 (Day 5 of concomitant treatment), an oral dose of apixaban 10 mg (2 × 5 mg) and oral doses of clarithromycin IR 500 mg 12 h apart.
One subject was discontinued from the study on day 7 because of an AE of generalized urticaria reported during BID clarithromycin treatment on day 6. 
On day 9-10 BID oral doses. Form: immediate release (IR)
